scripts.setup: cp $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local ./.env.local; cp $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/tenant/.env.local ./apps/tenant/.env.local; cp $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/platform/.env.local ./apps/platform/.env.local; mkdir -p .claude && cp $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.claude/settings.local.json ./.claude/settings.local.json; pnpm install
